titleStmt.title: SII 5.1189: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1189. (A.R. No. 308 of 1896). ON THE SAME PILLAR, EAST FACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē bāṇata¨rkkākṣiśaśisaṁkhyāgaṇānvi
tē . śrēṣṭhē māsi dvitīyyāyāṁ śuklapakṣā¨rkkavārakē .
gaṁgamāṁbāmahādēvī kū¨rmmēśē bhaktisaṁyutā . prādādācaṁ
dratārā¨rkkaṁ dīpahastāṁ suśōbhitāṁ . kū¨rmmasyāgrē pradīptya¨rtthaṁ prati
māmapratiprabhāṁ . putrapautrābhivṛddhya¨rtthaṁ narasiṁhyama
hīpatēḥ . makuṭaṁ ratnasaṁyuktaṁ ka¨rṇapatradvayānvitaṁ . A
ccaprabhābhirāpū¨rṇammuktāhārasya saptakaṁ . cōḷimālāṁ tathā
pyanyāṁmuktāhāraṁ samujvalaṁ . suva¨rṇnapātramēkaṁ ca Ū¨rdhvapu
ṁḍradvayaṁ śubhaṁ . gaṁgamāṁbākṛtō dha¨rmō vaiṣṇavaiḥ pratipālyatā
ṁ . Atratyaiḥ bhagavadbhaktai[¨r*]dha¨rmmapālanakāṁkṣibhiḥ . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1265 gunnēṁṭi jyēṣṭa śukla dvitīyyayu ravivāramunāṁḍu
gaṁgamahādēviṁgāru tamaku putrapautrābhivṛddhinni Āyu
ṣkāmyā¨rtthasiddhinni pratāpaśrī vīranarasiṁhyadēvamahārāju
lakunnu dī¨rghāyuṣmatsuputrāvāptya¨rtthamu rājyābhivṛddhigā
nu śrīkū¨rmmanādhuni sannidhini Akhaṁḍḍadīpahastapratimannu na
varatnāla makuṭamunnu mutyālahārālu 7 pahiṁḍikuḍu
ka 1 cōḷimāla 1 mutyālahāra 1 cinnālu 2 Ivi sama¨rppiṁci
ri . Ī dha¨rmamu tirupati śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣa . śatruṇāpikṛtōdha
¨rmmaḥ pālanīyyō manīṣibhiḥ .The other half of this well known verse is omitted.
Digital edition of SII 5.1189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
